title: Refine harness config and adapter generation
objective: Remove obsolete config fields, improve generated subagent docs, and refactor generation/config code for maintainability.
outOfScope: behavior changes unrelated to harness config or generated AI-facing files
acceptanceCriteria: hiddenLanguage is removed from harness config and related source docs where it is only redundant configuration
generated subagent markdown is more specific and operationally useful
generation/config code is easier to extend and test
